# Valid Proposal

## Status
- accepted

## Problem

The repository needs a clear lifecycle contract for top-level workflow artifacts.

## Goals

- Keep artifact-local status trustworthy.

## Non-goals

- Add a second central registry.

## Recommended direction

Use one repo-owned validator plus aligned guidance.

## Next artifacts

- `specs/valid-spec.md`

## Readiness

- Proposal review is complete. The next stage should be `spec`.
